prd.oneLiner: Connect new-hire profiles, role-based checklists, owner tasks, document and training confirmation, and operations analysis.
prd.goal: Raise first-week required onboarding completion to 95% or more.
prd.whyNow: Accounts, equipment, documents, and training requests are split across teams, causing missed steps and delays.
prd.problem: Accounts, equipment, documents, and training requests are split across teams, causing missed steps and delays.
prd.solution: Connect new-hire profiles, role-based checklists, owner tasks, document and training confirmation, and operations analysis.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: New hire
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Accounts, equipment, documents, and training requests are split across teams, causing missed steps and delays.

targets.name: HR and people operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Accounts, equipment, documents, and training requests are split across teams, causing missed steps and delays.

scenarios.text: New hire completes new-hire profile and onboarding task setup and checks progress.
HR and people operations coordinator reviews onboarding completion reporting by hire and department.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Raise first-week required onboarding completion to 95% or more.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: New-hire profile and onboarding task setup
Team task assignment and completion verification
Onboarding completion reporting by hire and department
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
